claims.text: The Ad ROI Calculator is a free tool published on blackarrow.ltd/tools
No signup required to use the free tools
$40 cost-per-lead / 10% vs 25% close rate example math

disclosure: The follow-up speed claim is presented as a general industry pattern, not a specific measured statistic, since no verifiable source is cited. The pricing policy and response-time claims describe Black Arrow's own operating practice.

claims.text: Most service businesses take hours to respond to a new lead, and those who respond within minutes close far more of them
Black Arrow does not quote done-for-you pricing before a diagnosis meeting
Every request gets a response within one business day
